message:
fix: harden agent registration/create flows and LIKE fallback semantics

- preserve existing agent task_description when register_agent omits it
- make create_agent atomic with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING duplicate handling
- align LIKE fallback term composition to union semantics for project/product/global search
- add regression tests for task-description preservation, duplicate create_agent, and fallback union behavior
- close br-3h13.11.3

Co-Authored-By: Codex GPT-5 <noreply@example.com>
